Contact Us
Boltera · Contact

Reach the people who actually answer.

Sample requests, distributor inquiries, regulatory questions, or hospital-side technical support — write to the team that handles it directly. Most messages get a reply within one business day.

Direct lines

Talk to us about your case schedule, your tender, or your tray.

Our clinical liaison and commercial teams sit in İstanbul and respond in EN / TR / DE. For urgent quality questions on a specific lot, please use the dedicated regulatory line.
